summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of song lyrics organizer app. UI functionality works perfectly, but critical Firebase permissions issue prevents data persistence.

critical_bugs.issue: Missing or insufficient permissions for read/write operations
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot load existing songs or save new lyrics

integration_issues.symptoms: Save attempts fail with 'Failed to save lyrics' toast notification

passed_tests: Home page loads with 'All' tab active and empty state message
New Lyrics button opens editor modal from header
Empty state 'Create Lyrics' button opens editor modal
Modal contains title input, lyrics textarea, category dropdown
Title input accepts text input correctly
Lyrics textarea handles multiline content properly
Category dropdown opens and shows options
Create New Category option appears in dropdown
New category input field appears when 'Create New Category' selected
New category input accepts text input
Form validation and interaction works correctly
Toast notifications display error messages properly
UI styling, colors, and responsive design work correctly
All data-testid attributes present for testing
success_percentage: Frontend UI: 95% (all UI functionality works), Data persistence: 0% (Firebase permissions block all database operations)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Configure Firebase Firestore security rules to allow read/write operations. The frontend implementation is excellent and fully functional - only database permissions need to be fixed.
